texto: A dirty player is somebody who ultimately is trying to hurt somebody. There's a huge difference. There's no gray in that. Like, you have no conscience, no nothing, no guilt. I don't have that mean streak in me. I don't play angry. It's not anger.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Ndamukong Suh: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “A dirty player is somebody who ultimately is trying to hurt somebody. There's a huge difference. …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, hurt, me pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de me e conscience.

frase_original: A dirty player is somebody who ultimately is trying to hurt somebody. There's a huge difference. There's no gray in that. Like, you have no conscience, no nothing, no guilt. I don't have that mean streak in me. I don't play angry. It's not anger.
